beds.title: Music Bed — Euphoric Newport Dance-House Draft
beds.note: v4 direction: original upbeat 124 BPM dance-house bed with four-on-the-floor pulse, bright piano/synth stabs, offbeat bass, and an upscale Equinox Newport Beach feel. Inspired by classic euphoric dance energy, not a copy of any song.

beds.title: Foley Bed — Deep Magnetic Recumbent Bike Whir
beds.note: Phone-audible v3 preview: deeper smooth electronic resistance whir with no percussive click. This is louder than final mix level so it can be judged on a phone.

beds.title: Combined Bed — Music Plus Recumbent Bike Foley
beds.note: v4 preview mix of the new euphoric dance-house music with the deep magnetic bike whir tucked underneath, before dialogue ducking or final polish.
